discoveryInfo: The adapter searches the network for Logitech Harmony Hubs. If no hub IP is listed below, every hub found in the network is added automatically.
networkInterfaceTooltip: Network interface used for hub discovery. Leave empty to use all interfaces (recommended for most setups).
discoverIntervalTooltip: How often a discovery broadcast is sent. Default 2000 ms.
devicesInfo: Optional. If you list one or more hub IPs here, the adapter contacts only those IPs directly and skips the broadcast. Use this for hubs in a different subnet or when broadcast is blocked on your network.
